pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project must compile and run against JDK 21; keeping 17 would result in incorrect bytecode version or build failures if strict checks are enabled.

pom.xml.general_idea: Rename springdoc artifact from springdoc-openapi-webflux-ui to springdoc-openapi-starter-webflux-ui to match the new 2.x API structure.
pom.xml.why_exists: The old artifact ID does not exist in the 2.x series; using it would cause a dependency resolution failure.
